combined_text: What is SUPIMA or PIMA Cotton? Quora User, works at Farming Answered May 11, 2016 · Author has 920 answers and 420.5k answer views Pima cotton is a long-staple cotton grown primarily in California and Arizona. It is exceptionally strong and fine. Supima ( www.supima.com) is a trade name used by a group of Pima growers who adhere
